# North Fin Services

Professional tax filing services across Canada. Fully online. Focus on British Columbia and nationwide.

## Main pages (priority for AI/citations)
- Homepage: https://northfinservices.com/
- About: https://northfinservices.com/about.html
- Contact: https://northfinservices.com/contact.html
- FAQ: https://northfinservices.com/faq.html

## Services
- Personal tax preparation: https://northfinservices.com/services/personal-tax.html
- International students & newcomers: https://northfinservices.com/services/international-students-newcomers.html
- Self-employed & gig workers (Uber, DoorDash, Lyft): https://northfinservices.com/services/self-employed-gig.html
- GST/HST returns: https://northfinservices.com/services/gst-hst-returns.html
- Tax planning: https://northfinservices.com/services/tax-planning.html
- Incorporation: https://northfinservices.com/services/incorporation.html

## Contact
- Phone: +1 (250) 299-5000
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/12502995000?text=Hi!%20I%20want%20to%20save%20my%20tax.
- Email: contact@northfinservices.com

## Summary
North Fin Services offers expert Canadian tax filing for individuals, international students, newcomers, self-employed and gig workers. Services include personal T1 returns, GST/HST filing, tax planning, and incorporation. All services are provided remotely (online). Service area: Canada, with emphasis on British Columbia.
